title: spiraea × watsoniana
intro: Spiraea × watsoniana, also known as Japanese Spirea or Watson Spirea, is a deciduous shrub that is a hybrid of Spiraea japonica and Spiraea media. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its flowers, leaves, and roots, which are used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Spiraea × watsoniana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots can be dried or made into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions to be used as a tea or taken as a supplement.
